title: Goety Focus
description: Added a special Crystal Socket slot. Spells can be cast without a staff. Based on the type of Crystal placed in the socket, players will gain unique set bonuses, as well as additional damage scaling tied to soul energy
body:
Added a special Crystal Socket slot. Spells can be cast without a staff. Based on the type of Crystal placed in the socket, players will gain unique set bonuses, as well as additional damage scaling tied to soul energy. This damage bonus can be customized via the configuration file.

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d3b6a05b418368fe9fe700bfd574e842c319cb.png)
